'''jorathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:chagrinning|chagrinning]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chagrinning|chagrinning]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jorathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jorathithi|jorathithi]] || [[word:jorathiji|jorathiji]] || [[word:jorathishi|jorathishi]] || [[word:jorathiki|jorathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jorathuthuthu|jorathuthuthu]] || [[word:jorathujuju|jorathujuju]] || [[word:jorathushushu|jorathushushu]] || [[word:jorathukuku|jorathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jorathuthu|jorathuthu]] || [[word:jorathuju|jorathuju]] || [[word:jorathushu|jorathushu]] || [[word:jorathuku|jorathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jorathufthuf|jorathufthuf]] || [[word:jorathufjuf|jorathufjuf]] || [[word:jorathufshuf|jorathufshuf]] || [[word:jorathufkuf|jorathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jorathethe|jorathethe]] || [[word:joratheje|joratheje]] || [[word:joratheshe|joratheshe]] || [[word:joratheke|joratheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jorathothotho|jorathothotho]] || [[word:jorathojojo|jorathojojo]] || [[word:jorathoshosho|jorathoshosho]] || [[word:jorathokoko|jorathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jorathotho|jorathotho]] || [[word:jorathojo|jorathojo]] || [[word:jorathosho|jorathosho]] || [[word:jorathoko|jorathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jorathofthof|jorathofthof]] || [[word:jorathofjof|jorathofjof]] || [[word:jorathofshof|jorathofshof]] || [[word:jorathofkof|jorathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jorathïfthïf|jorathïfthïf]] || [[word:jorathïfjïf|jorathïfjïf]] || [[word:jorathïfshïf|jorathïfshïf]] || [[word:jorathïfkïf|jorathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jorathïfthïfthïf|jorathïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:jorathïfjïfjïf|jorathïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:jorathïfshïfshïf|jorathïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:jorathïfkïfkïf|jorathïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jorathïfthïf|jorathïfthïf]] || [[word:jorathïfjïf|jorathïfjïf]] || [[word:jorathïfshïf|jorathïfshïf]] || [[word:jorathïfkïf|jorathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jorathïfthïf|jorathïfthïf]] || [[word:jorathïfjïf|jorathïfjïf]] || [[word:jorathïfshïf|jorathïfshïf]] || [[word:jorathïfkïf|jorathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jorathæthæ|jorathæthæ]] || [[word:jorathæjæ|jorathæjæ]] || [[word:jorathæshæ|jorathæshæ]] || [[word:jorathækæ|jorathækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jorathathatha|jorathathatha]] || [[word:jorathajaja|jorathajaja]] || [[word:jorathashasha|jorathashasha]] || [[word:jorathakaka|jorathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jorathatha|jorathatha]] || [[word:jorathaja|jorathaja]] || [[word:jorathasha|jorathasha]] || [[word:jorathaka|jorathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jorathafthaf|jorathafthaf]] || [[word:jorathafjaf|jorathafjaf]] || [[word:jorathafshaf|jorathafshaf]] || [[word:jorathafkaf|jorathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jorathasha|jorathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jorathshësha|jorathshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jorathrosha|jorathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jorathmusha|jorathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jorathyasha|jorathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojorathnkshësha|gojorathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojorathnkrosha|gojorathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojorathnkmusha|gojorathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojorathnkyasha|gojorathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jorarathasha|jorarathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jorarathshësha|jorarathshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jorarathrosha|jorarathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jorarathmusha|jorarathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jorarathyasha|jorarathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojorarathnkshësha|gojorarathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojorarathnkrosha|gojorarathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojorarathnkmusha|gojorarathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojorarathnkyasha|gojorarathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jeræthasha|jeræthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jeræthshësha|jeræthshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jeræthrosha|jeræthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jeræthmusha|jeræthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jeræthyasha|jeræthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojeræthnkshësha|gojeræthnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojeræthnkrosha|gojeræthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojeræthnkmusha|gojeræthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojeræthnkyasha|gojeræthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jorfathasha|jorfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jorfathshësha|jorfathshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jorfathrosha|jorfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jorfathmusha|jorfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jorfathyasha|jorfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojorfathnkshësha|gojorfathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojorfathnkrosha|gojorfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojorfathnkmusha|gojorfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojorfathnkyasha|gojorfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
